assertions.description: Output contains exactly three labeled variants (Breaking/Urgent, Informational, Curiosity-Driven) each with a character count in brackets
All three variants fit within the stated character limit with no truncation
A deployment guidance line specifies which variant to use for which audience segment

assertion_results.note: Three variants correctly labeled with character counts
Deployment line specifies breaking-news subscribers vs general audience
Three variants with counts for 65-char Android limit
All three fit within compressed Android display
Guidance addresses the feature vs breaking distinction
Three variants labeled with counts, EU terminology preserved
All within 110-char limit, euro symbol handled correctly

methodology: Binary assertion testing: 3 inputs (standard, minimal, European context) x 3 assertions per skill. Each assertion graded pass/fail based on whether generated output satisfies the requirement.
